_comment_input_source: Select 'rtsp', 'usb', or 'file' for your input source
_comment_device_id: Device identifier for MQTT messages. Leave empty to auto-detect from MAC address

_input_source_notes.note: Set input_source to your desired input type. Configure all three sources so you can easily switch between them
_input_source_notes.usage: Change 'input_source' value to switch between inputs without editing URLs/paths

_input_source_priority_notes.description: Controls where video input configuration is read from
_input_source_priority_notes.config: Use 'input' section from this config.json file (default, easier for deployment)
_input_source_priority_notes.registry: Use BrightSign registry value 'bsext-gaze-video-device' (flexible for runtime changes)
_input_source_priority_notes.priority: CLI args > [config or registry based on this setting] > [other] > auto-detect
_input_source_priority_notes.note: Set to 'config' to use config.json, or 'registry' to use BrightSign registry

_test_mode_notes.description: Test mode configuration for debugging individual models
_test_mode_notes.test_face_only: Set to true to run ONLY RetinaFace (disable YOLOX). Default: false
_test_mode_notes.test_yolo_only: Set to true to run ONLY YOLOX (disable RetinaFace). Default: false
_test_mode_notes.note: Both can be false (default) to run both models in parallel on separate NPU cores (production mode)
_test_mode_notes.usage: See TEST_MODES.md for detailed usage examples and debugging workflows

options.debug: Most verbose - all logs including DEBUG messages (use for development/troubleshooting)
options.info: General information - INFO, WARN, ERROR, and CRITICAL messages (recommended default)
options.warn: Warnings and errors only - WARN, ERROR, and CRITICAL messages (production mode)
options.error: Errors only - ERROR and CRITICAL messages (minimal logging)

_log_level_notes.note: Change log_level without recompiling. Logs are written to log_dir location.

_blur_faces_notes.description: Face blurring for privacy protection in output frames
_blur_faces_notes.defaults: All blur settings are optional. Defaults: blur_faces=false, blur_method=pixelate, blur_intensity=12
_blur_faces_notes.blur_faces: Set to true to enable face blurring (default: false)

blur_method.pixelate: Fast mosaic/pixelation effect (default, recommended) - irreversible anonymization
blur_method.gaussian: Smooth blur effect - use kernel size >= 71 for effective anonymization

blur_intensity.pixelate: Block size in pixels (4-32). Smaller = more detail visible. Default: 12
blur_intensity.gaussian: Kernel size (31-99, must be odd). Larger = more blur. Recommended: 71

_blur_faces_notes.note: Blur is applied AFTER gaze detection, only affecting output images written to output_dir
_blur_faces_notes.minimal_config: To enable with defaults, just add: "blur_faces": true
